response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over two decades of hands-on technical expertise and a strong background in open-source technologies. However, he is not a fit for this Head of Development role primarily because he only possesses basic German language skills, whereas the position strictly requires C1 proficiency for client advisory duties. Additionally, his background is heavily focused on individual contributor roles (Staff/Senior Developer) and technical execution rather than the executive-level team leadership, enterprise IT architecture, and compliance consulting required for this senior management position.
strengths: Extensive 20+ year technical background in modern software development, including full-stack and microservices architectures.
Deep commitment to open-source technologies and Linux environments, demonstrated by founding and developing the GISCollective platform.
Proven passion for mentoring and knowledge sharing through organizing technical workshops, refactoring dojos, and coding courses.
concerns: Possesses only basic German skills, falling significantly short of the mandatory C1 requirement for client-facing advisory.
Lacks explicit executive-level leadership, formal team management, and operational oversight experience expected of a Head of Development.
Missing specific required and desired domain skills such as Python, UML modeling, and enterprise IT security/compliance expertise.
